mysite
Table of Contents

Interface IBackup

Namespace
Service.Contracts
Assembly
Service.dll

Contract for database backup and restore operations.

public interface IBackup

Methods

BackUpDataBase(string, string)

Creates a backup of the specified database at the given path.

void BackUpDataBase(string database, string path)

Parameters

database string

Name of the database to back up.

path string

Directory path where the backup file will be written.

DeleteBackup(string)

Deletes a backup file by its file name.

void DeleteBackup(string filename)

Parameters

filename string

Name of the backup file to delete (not a full path).

ListBackups()

Lists all available backup files in the configured backup directory.

List<BackupFile> ListBackups()

Returns

List<BackupFile>

A list of BackupFile descriptors; empty if no backups exist.

RestoreDataBase(string, string)

Restores a database from a backup file.

void RestoreDataBase(string database, string path)

Parameters

database string

Name of the target database to restore into.

path string

Full path of the backup file to restore from.
